companyNameJapanese: 晶合集成電路股份有限公司
description: China's third-largest semiconductor foundry, founded 2015 in Hefei, Anhui. Listed on Shanghai STAR Market 2023. Primarily 12-inch wafer foundry. World's leading DDIC (Display Driver IC) foundry. Product mix: DDIC 68.5%, CIS 16%, PMIC 9%, MCU 2.4%, Logic 3.8%. Technology nodes extend to 55nm with 40nm in development. Joint venture origin with Powerchip Semiconductor (Taiwan). Key customer for wafer probing, dicing, and CMP equipment.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - probing, dicing, CMP equipment for 12-inch fab
_externalRelationships.notes: China's #3 foundry after SMIC and Hua Hong. Market cap ~79.8B CNY (~1.68T JPY). Stock price ~37 CNY (Feb 2026). 52-week range: 17.80-41.80 CNY (+60.88% 1yr). Q1-Q3 2025 revenue: 8.13B CNY (+20% YoY). Most aggressive expander among Chinese foundries. As a 12-inch foundry, requires comprehensive ACCRETECH equipment including probers (wafer testing), dicers (wafer cutting), and CMP machines (surface planarization). JV origin with Taiwan's Powerchip gave initial technology access.

_metadata.dataSource: Investing.com, SSE, company website, industry reports, Chinese language sources
